function.name: agent_delegate
function.description: Delegate a task to another named agent (defined under agents/<name>/system.md). The sub-agent runs in a separate process with NON_INTERACTIVE=1, with exec_command and agent_delegate hard-removed from its toolset, and a max iteration cap. The sub-agent's final reply is returned. Maximum delegation depth is 2.

agent.description: Name of the target agent (must match agents/<name>/system.md)

task.description: The task description / prompt to send to the target agent

topic.description: Optional blackboard topic key (auto-generated if omitted)
